note: Select (or other) provides two Forms API #type elements and two field widgets, plus per-widget settings. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) probing documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site I want a select list with an 'Other' write-in option on my fields. Which two field widgets does the select_or_other module provide and which field types does each support?
evals.expected_output: select_or_other_list for list_integer/list_float/list_string fields; select_or_other_reference for entity_reference fields. Both are labeled 'Select or Other' on Manage form display.

evals.prompt: In a custom Drupal module form I want a select box (or radios/checkboxes) that has an 'Other' free-text option. Which Forms API #type values does select_or_other provide?
evals.expected_output: #type => 'select_or_other_select' (renders a <select>) and #type => 'select_or_other_buttons' (renders radios for single or checkboxes for multiple).

evals.prompt: Using the select_or_other list widget on a List (text) field, which setting controls whether values typed into the 'Other' box get added to the field's allowed values list, and what is its default?
evals.expected_output: The add_other_value_to_allowed_values setting (default true) on the select_or_other_list widget adds entered 'other' values to the field storage's allowed_values.

evals.prompt: I want the select_or_other field widget to render as radio buttons/checkboxes instead of a dropdown. Which widget setting do I change and what are its two possible values?
evals.expected_output: Set the select_element_type widget setting to select_or_other_buttons (Check boxes/radio buttons); the default is select_or_other_select (Select list).

evals.prompt: With the select_or_other reference widget on an entity_reference field, under what condition is the 'Other' option offered and what happens when a user enters a value that is not in the list?
evals.expected_output: The 'Other' option is offered only when the field's entity-reference selection handler has auto_create enabled and the user has create access; entering a new value auto-creates the referenced entity (e.g. a new taxonomy term).

evals.prompt: How does the select_or_other element show the free-text 'Other' field only after the user selects the Other option, and why does the multi-value select case need special handling?
evals.expected_output: It uses Form API #states to make the 'other' textfield visible when the '- Other -' choice is selected; because core #states does not support multi-value selects, the select variant attaches the select_or_other/multiple_select_states_hack JS library instead.

evals.prompt: In the select_or_other Forms API element, which property makes the element return a single flat array combining the chosen select values and the typed 'other' value?
evals.expected_output: Set #merged_values => TRUE so valueCallback returns one flat array merging the select values and the 'other' text (otherwise it returns ['select' => [...], 'other' => [...]]).
